task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate and open Malka Hartmann's patient record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or demographics page for Malka Hartmann (ID 12, DOB 1994-11-26) is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Update Malka Hartmann's home phone number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The home phone number field in Malka Hartmann's record is updated to '413-555-2847' and the changes are saved (look for a success message or the updated number in the read-only view).

task_completion.description: Locate and open Myrtis Armstrong's patient record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart for Myrtis Armstrong (ID 16, DOB 1985-04-08) is displayed on the screen, specifically navigating to the allergies section.

task_completion.description: Add Penicillin allergy for Myrtis Armstrong
task_completion.visual_evidence: An allergy entry for 'Penicillin' with reaction 'anaphylaxis' and severity 'severe' is visible and saved in Myrtis Armstrong's chart.

task_completion.description: Locate and open Arlie McClure's patient record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart for Arlie McClure (ID 17, DOB 1971-03-06) is displayed on the screen, specifically navigating to the active problem list or diagnosis section.

task_completion.description: Add Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus diagnosis for Arlie McClure
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagnosis/problem entry for ICD code '250.00' (Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus) with an onset date of '2019-03-15' is visible and saved in Arlie McClure's chart.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the FreeMED web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is open to localhost/freemed/ and interactions are performed within the web interface, not via terminal scripts or curl commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database modification
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running MySQL, SQLite, or other database client commands are visible modifying the patient records directly.

integrity.description: Agent saved the changes rather than just typing them
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual confirmation that forms were submitted, such as success banners, saved record lists, or the updated values appearing in the read-only view of the patient charts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient 1: Malka Hartmann (ID 12, DOB 1994-11-26). Target phone number: 413-555-2847. Patient 2: Myrtis Armstrong (ID 16, DOB 1985-04-08). Target allergy: Penicillin, reaction: anaphylaxis, severity: severe. Patient 3: Arlie McClure (ID 17, DOB 1971-03-06). Target diagnosis: ICD 250.00 (Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus), onset: 2019-03-15. All updates must be visually confirmed as saved within the FreeMED web application.
